final:
module top_module(
  input clk,            // Add clk input as it was missing
  input [15:0] data_in,
  input enable,
  output reg [15:0] data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
  if (enable) begin
    data_out <= data_in;
  end
end

endmodule
